skill1.kitLine: Activates every 0.2 sec while charging. Lock-On: Designates nearest non-Lock-On enemy as Seven Dwarves target. Max Lock-On targets: 5. Deactivation: normal attack or taking cover.
skill1.note: Single-boss scope: targeting/caps irrelevant. Ammo counts derived from this mechanic ARE baked into flatDamage values (527.95% = 105.59×5 baseline).

skill1.kitLine: Auto Fire Ready — Effect: DEF ▲ 42.24% continuously.
skill1.note: Defensive stat; inert for damage sim (hard rule 3 per ks-extracts).

skill1.kitLine: Auto Fire Ready — Function: Loads Seven Dwarves with ammo. Max ammo: 5. Deactivation: normal attack.
skill1.note: Loading mechanic itself unmodeled, but the ammo count (5 baseline, 15 in Fully Active) is encoded in the flatDamage atkPct values of skill1[1] and skill1[2].

skill1.kitLine: Activates every 0.2 sec while charging. Affects all Lock-On enemies. Damage Taken ▲ 4.2% for 4 sec.
skill1.note: Modeled as always-on passive (no durationSec). Kit has 4s duration refreshing every 0.2s while charging; passive is equivalent under continuous-charge assumption. Minor overcount if charging pauses >4s.

skill1.kitLine: Auto Fire Effect 1: Deals 41.9% of final ATK as damage. Affects all enemies.
skill1.note: Baseline AoE auto-fire per full-charge shot.

skill1.kitLine: Auto Fire Effect 2: Deals 105.59% of final ATK as damage × loaded ammo (sequential). Baseline 5 ammo = 527.95%.
skill1.note: 105.59×5 = 527.95% baseline volley. Sequential flavor enables sequentialDamagePct dilution.

skill1.kitLine: Activates when attacking with Full Charge while in Seven Dwarves Fully Active. Number of uses ▼ 1.
skill1.note: Use-count decrement not explicitly modeled, but the 2-use constraint is captured by maxShots:2 on the weaponSwap. Note lists 'use-count bookkeeping' as skipped (sim always full-charges), but practical effect is equivalent.

skill1.kitLine: Activates when performing a normal attack while not in Full Burst. Removes Seven Dwarves Fully Active.
skill1.note: Sim always full-charges; normal attacks never occur, so this removal path is inert.

skill2.kitLine: Activates at start of battle. Fixes charge time at 1.2 sec continuously.
skill2.where: note (prose) only — absent from unmodeled.skill2 array
skill2.note: ⚑ STRUCTURED-ARRAY GAP: discussed in note ('charge-time fixes at 1.2s/3.2s — sim uses fixed cadence, main approximation, may overcount ~3 phantom baseline auto-fires during slower Fully Active window') but NOT listed in unmodeled.skill2. Not a silent drop (note covers it), but the structured unmodeled array is incomplete.

skill2.kitLine: Activates during Full Charge. Gains Pierce for 5 sec.
skill2.note: Inert vs single partless boss. ks-extracts flags 'hasPierce unset' — backfilled into unmodeled.

skill2.kitLine: Activates during Full Charge. ATK ▲ 46.84% for 5 sec.
skill2.note: Trigger is shotFired (fires every shot); kit says 'during Full Charge'. Equivalent under always-full-charge SR assumption.

skill2.kitLine: Activates during Full Charge. Damage to Parts ▲ 62.64% for 5 sec.
skill2.note: Kept for fidelity though inert vs partless boss (note explicitly states this).

skill2.kitLine: Activates when entering Burst Stage 3. ATK ▲ 73.92% for 10 sec.
skill2.where: skill2[1] — stageEnter stage:3 buff atkPct 73.92 durationSec:10

skill2.kitLine: Activates when at Full Charge only while in Seven Dwarves Fully Active. Charge Damage ▲ 528% for 1 round(s).
skill2.where: skill2[2] — burstCast buff chargeDamagePct 528 durationSec:10 whileSwapped:true
skill2.note: Kit says '1 round' ×2 uses; note says 6.5s to cover both swap rounds. Block uses durationSec:10 gated by whileSwapped:true (effective duration = swap window). Additive charge points confirmed by prydwen '778%' quote.

skill2.where: skill2[2] — burstCast buff sequentialDamagePct 158.4 durationSec:10 whileSwapped:true
skill2.note: PRYDWEN-CONFIRMED as ATK DMG (damage-up bucket) buff, diluted at deal time. Applies only to sequential-flavored hits (527.95 baseline + 1055.9 lump).

burst.kitLine: Affects self. Attack Damage ▲ 84.48% for 10 sec.
Seven Dwarves Fully Active — Function: Increases max Lock-On targets and max ammo, increases Charge Time. Number of uses: 2.
burst.note: Function description unmodeled as a mechanic, but ALL practical damage effects are captured: charge time 3.2s → weaponSwap chargeTimeSec:3.2; ammo 5→15 → extra 1055.9% volley in skill1[2]; 2 uses → weaponSwap maxShots:2. The unmodeled entry is a documentation artifact, not a damage gap.

burst.kitLine: Effect 1: Fixes charge time at 3.2 sec continuously.
burst.note: Modeled via weaponSwap config rather than a buff block.

burst.kitLine: Effect 3: Max ammo loaded by Auto Fire Ready ▲ 10 continuously.
burst.where: skill1[2] — shotFired swapGate:'swapped' flatDamage atkPct 1055.9 flavor:sequential
burst.note: Extra 10 ammo × 105.59% = 1055.9% per swap shot. Cross-slot: burst's ammo boost is expressed as damage in skill1's swap-gated block.

burst.kitLine: Deactivation condition: When the number of uses reaches 0.
burst.note: maxShots:2 ends the swap after 2 shots, equivalent to use-count reaching 0.

burst.kitLine: Affects all destructible projectiles. Deals 41.9% of final ATK as damage.
burst.note: No destructible projectiles vs single boss. Inert.

documentedConfounds.text: Charge-time fixes at 1.2s/3.2s not modeled — sim uses fixed cadence. 'This is the main approximation, may overcount ~3 phantom baseline auto-fires during the slower Fully Active window.'
documentedConfounds.why: Overcounting ~3 baseline auto-fires (each 41.9+527.95 = 569.85%) during the 6.5s Fully Active window would inflate sim damage. This is the author's own flagged main approximation.

documentedConfounds.text: Residual uses-vs-time question logged as H2 in experiment-harness-ai.md — whether the Fully Active volley is delivered by uses or by time.
documentedConfounds.why: Open measurement question. If volleys are time-gated rather than use-gated, a swap shot lost to the 6.5s window also loses its volley (author's current assumption). If uses persist beyond the window, sim undercounts.

documentedConfounds.text: Q8 CORRECTED (2026-07-17): noBoltRecovery charFixes exemption REMOVED. She is a release-fired SR (input_type='UP') and takes +22f bolt recovery. 'This cools her out-of-burst baseline auto-fire (she was ~1.073 HOT, cadence-⚑).'
documentedConfounds.why: This was a FIX that cooled a prior HOT state. The current board (0.982 OK) confirms the correction landed. Listed as a resolved confound for the judge's awareness.

documentedConfounds.text: DEF ▲ 42.24% (Auto Fire Ready) dropped — defensive stat, hard rule 3.
documentedConfounds.why: DEF has no damage-sim impact. Correctly excluded.

documentedConfounds.text: Pierce for 5 sec (skill2 Full Charge) — inert vs single partless boss.
documentedConfounds.why: No parts to pierce in scope-lock single-boss sim. hasPierce unset is correct.

documentedConfounds.text: Parts-damage +62.64% kept for fidelity though inert vs partless boss.
documentedConfounds.why: Modeled but inert — no parts in the sim target. No gap impact.

documentedConfounds.text: Lock-On targeting, Max-Lock-On/ammo caps, normal-attack removal of Fully Active — single-boss / always-full-charge scope.
documentedConfounds.why: All inert under the sim's single-boss, always-full-charge assumptions.

documentedConfounds.text: Burst 41.9% to destructible projectiles — none vs single boss.
documentedConfounds.why: No destructible projectiles in scope-lock single-boss sim.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2 charge-time fix at 1.2s is discussed in the note but ABSENT from the structured unmodeled.skill2 array.
documentedConfounds.why: The 1.2s charge fix (vs datamined 72f ≈ 1.2s base) may be a no-op if the sim already uses 72f, but the note flags the charge-time approximation as the main HOT risk. The structured-array gap means a naive unmodeled scan would miss this confound.

authorIntentSummary: The override models SWHA as a charge-SR whose Seven Dwarves auto-fire piggybacks every full-charge shot (41.9% AoE + 527.95% sequential baseline volley), with a burst-triggered weaponSwap mode (2 shots at 3.2s charge, 69.04% per shot) that adds an extra 1055.9% sequential volley per swap shot via a swapGate block. The Fully Active era buffs (charge damage +528%, sequential damage +158.4%) are whileSwapped buffs diluted at deal time. The main acknowledged approximation is fixed cadence vs the kit's charge-time fixes (1.2s base / 3.2s Fully Active), which may overcount ~3 phantom baseline auto-fires during the slower Fully Active window; the author flags this as the primary HOT risk and logs the residual uses-vs-time delivery question as an open H2 hypothesis. All other skips (DEF, Pierce, Lock-On targeting, destructible projectiles, normal-attack removal) are documented as inert under the single-boss always-full-charge scope.
